## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)

If applicable, especially for UI changes
